customManagers.description: Container image refs pinned in role vars; quadlet templates render them.
Grafana dashboard revisions pinned in role vars; the role fetches them from grafana.com at converge.
tflint pinned in the lint workflow; setup-tflint installs it, the pre-commit hook runs it (no zypper package).

packageRules.description: Grafana dashboard revisions are bare incrementing integers.
pinDigest updates carry no version change, so the lint check is enough to merge them unattended.
linuxserver images carry legacy build-number (151), two-part (5.14), and four-part tags that docker versioning reads as upgrades; their releases are strict semver, so reject the rest.
lidarr has a legacy 8.1.2135 tag that even strict semver accepts; mainline is 3.x.
Merging a plex bump deploys a container restart that kills active streams; only automerge in the small hours.

python-dateutil is a hard dep of hetzner.hcloud (its vendored hcloud SDK imports dateutil.parser.isoparse); upstream tried datetime.fromisoformat and reverted over the ISO-8601 Z suffix. It's stable, not abandoned, just release-inactive.
